title: Replace UNICO site logo with uploaded image

requirements.text: Add the user-provided new logo (from the uploaded WhatsApp images) as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated, and update the header logo in frontend/src/App.tsx to use this new logo file instead of the current /assets/generated/1000035744.jpeg.dim_512x512.png.

quotes: i wont to change the logo in to this

acceptanceCriteria: The header logo image in the top bar renders the new uploaded logo and no longer references /assets/generated/1000035744.jpeg.dim_512x512.png.
The new logo file exists in frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename specified in the image requirements.
The logo remains visually crisp and properly contained (no stretching) at the existing displayed size (h-16 w-16).

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui or any other frontend immutable paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Do not route static images through the backend; serve them from frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend.
nonGoals: Do not change any page copy, layout, or colors beyond what is required to swap the logo image.

required: Circular globe logo with gold ring and navy line art, with the wordmark 'UNICO' and subtitle 'GLOBAL TRADE & EXCELLENCE' centered below on a clean white background (unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png)
edits: Replace the existing header logo asset with the new provided logo (1000035744.jpeg.dim_512x512.png > unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png)
